ItemData.Name: Sa Di phuc
ItemData.Descript: Tang y danh cho cac tieu Sa Di vua nhap mon

ItemData.Name: Tang y
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc tang nhan thuong mac

ItemData.Name: Bach Nap y
ItemData.Descript: Thuong phuc chu yeu cua cac Tang nhan Han trieu

ItemData.Name: An da hoi
ItemData.Descript: "Con goi la Ngu Dieu y, ao cua cac tang nhan mac trong nhung luc thong thuong"

ItemData.Name: Uat Da La Tang
ItemData.Descript: "Con goi la That Dieu y, ao cua cac tang nhan mac trong nhung luc trang nghiem"

ItemData.Name: Tang Hai
ItemData.Descript: "Le phuc cua Tang nhan, mac trong nhung luc trang nghiem"

ItemData.Name: Nguyen Bach Ca Sa
ItemData.Descript: "Con goi la That Dieu y, y phuc cua cac tang nhan chuc vi cao"

ItemData.Name: Minh Tinh Ca Sa
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc thuong ngay cua cac vi cao tang

ItemData.Name: Kim Lo Ca Sa
ItemData.Descript: bao vat cua Phat mon

ItemData.Name: That Bao Ca Sa
ItemData.Descript: "La ""Phat mon chi bao"", do Phat To tang cho Duong Tam Tang khi di thinh kinh"

ItemData.Name: Dao si vo bao
ItemData.Descript: La y phuc cua cac dao si thuong mac khi luyen vo

ItemData.Name: Dao si truong bao
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc thuong ngay cua Dao si

ItemData.Name: Tinh y
ItemData.Descript: Le phuc cua cac Dao si thuong mac khi lam phep

ItemData.Name: Thanh Tung Phap bao
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc cua nhung dao si moi nhap mon

ItemData.Name: Thien su dao bao
ItemData.Descript: "Y phuc chi danh cho nhung nguoi dao hanh tham sau, duoc ton danh Thien Su "

ItemData.Name: Huyen Vo phap y
ItemData.Descript: "Tap hop linh khi Huyen Vo, ""Huyen mon chi bao"""

ItemData.Name: That Bao Ha y
ItemData.Descript: "Trong ben ngoai co ve tam thuong, nhung thuc chat la mot ""bao y"""

ItemData.Name: Tam Thanh Bao
ItemData.Descript: "Phan ta quy chanh, nguoi mac no luon co long thien tam. "

ItemData.Name: Thien Nien Hac Suong
ItemData.Descript: "Dung long Hac de diem xuyen xung quanh, day chinh la su tuong trung cho tri hue. "

ItemData.Name: Chan Vu Thanh Y
ItemData.Descript: Mac vao se giup ta tang nhanh than luc

ItemData.Name: Con y
ItemData.Descript: ao danh cho cac sat thu cap thap nhat an giau than phan

ItemData.Name: Te Truc Con y
ItemData.Descript: Con y duoc dac che

ItemData.Name: Thich Khach y
ItemData.Descript: Cung giong nhu Con y nhung co nhieu tui de chua am khi.

ItemData.Name: Mong mi y
ItemData.Descript: "Dung cac vat lieu dac biet ma che thanh, su dung linh hoat. "

ItemData.Name: Vo Sac y
ItemData.Descript: "Co the tang hinh di vao nhieu noi, thich hop cho sat thu "

ItemData.Name: Ngu Nhan y
ItemData.Descript: Trang bi cho cac sat thu cap cao.

ItemData.Name: Lien Van y
ItemData.Descript: "Y phuc hiem co, tinh linh hoat va tinh phong ngu cuc cao"

ItemData.Name: Thien Mong y
ItemData.Descript: "Nguoi mac vao hinh bong giong nhu trong mo, khong the bat duoc"

ItemData.Name: Vo Dung Kinh y
ItemData.Descript: "La thu ao ma cac thich khach deu thich trang bi, co the giau duoc nhieu am khi. "

ItemData.Name: Thien Nhan Mat Trang
ItemData.Descript: "Tap trung sat khi vo bien, gap than giet than, gap Phat giet Phat. "

ItemData.Name: Tho Bo truong bao
ItemData.Descript: Do cac loai vai tho det thanh

ItemData.Name: Khinh Cat sam
ItemData.Descript: "To Cat det thanh, chac chan kho xuyen. "

ItemData.Name: Doan bao
ItemData.Descript: "Cam doan det thanh, mem mai thoai mai. "

ItemData.Name: Dat Hiep y
ItemData.Descript: "Thich hop voi cac hiep khach, nhe nhang linh hoat. "

ItemData.Name: Nhiem Hiep phuc
ItemData.Descript: La loai y phuc ma cac hiep khach o Ngu Lang thuong mac.

ItemData.Name: Luu Thai Phuc
ItemData.Descript: "Dang ve nho nha, mem mai ma nghiem trang. "

ItemData.Name: Ngan To Bao
ItemData.Descript: "Dung Tam to phoi hop voi Ngan to che thanh, co kha nang phong ngu cuc tot. "

ItemData.Name: Tu Kim bao
ItemData.Descript: "Dung Tam to phoi hop voi Kim to che thanh, vua danh quy vua co the ho than. "

ItemData.Name: Han Suong bao
ItemData.Descript: "Dung Tam to phoi hop voi Bach Kim to che thanh, danh quy vo cung. "

ItemData.Name: Giang Sa Bao
ItemData.Descript: "Dung Giang Sa che thanh, dung cho cac bac de vuong, cao quy kho ta. "

ItemData.Name: Toa Tu giap
ItemData.Descript: "Trang bi cho nhung si tot trong quan doi, suc phong ngu kem. "

ItemData.Name: Luong Dang Khai
ItemData.Descript: "Do hai manh truoc sau hop thanh, thoi Pho Duong thuong thay. "

ItemData.Name: Minh Quang Khai
ItemData.Descript: Loai ao giap thuong trang bi cho binh si thoi Duong.

ItemData.Name: Te Lan giap
ItemData.Descript: "Do nhieu mieng thep mong ghep thanh, gon nhe linh hoat. "

ItemData.Name: O Chuy giap
ItemData.Descript: "ao giap nhu hinh dang qua, gon nhe linh hoat. "

ItemData.Name: Son Van Tu giap
ItemData.Descript: "La mot manh ao giap. giua loi, hai ben lom, cong dung chong ten. "

ItemData.Name: Giai Trai giap
ItemData.Descript: "Dung toan da cua quai thu va da Giai Trai ket thanh, kien co vo cung. "

ItemData.Name: Toan Nghe giap
ItemData.Descript: "La loai ao giap cua cac danh tuong, dao ten khong the xuyen thung. "

ItemData.Name: Toa Tu Hoang Kim giap
ItemData.Descript: "Thien ha vang danh, dao ten khong the pham vao da"

ItemData.Name: Duong Nghe giap
ItemData.Descript: "truyen thiet day la ho than bao giap cua La On Hau, la ho phap cuc pham"

ItemData.Name: Lan Bo y
ItemData.Descript: "la thu vai bang vo cay, chi mac nhung luc binh thuong"

ItemData.Name: Pho thong Cai y
ItemData.Descript: "La y phuc cua nhung nguoi an may binh thuong, giong nhu Bo y, co rat nhieu tui"

ItemData.Name: ao an may
ItemData.Descript: "La y phuc cua nhung nguoi an may binh thuong, danh cho nguoi cap thap nhat"

ItemData.Name: Tho Ma Cai y
ItemData.Descript: La y phuc cua nhung nguoi an may binh thuonglam bang vo cay

ItemData.Name: Tam Ma Cai y
ItemData.Descript: "Thuong phuc cua Cai Bang truong lao, tinh che tu nhung cay Tam Ma. "

ItemData.Name: Hoa Ma Cai y
ItemData.Descript: "Thuong phuc cua Cai Bang truong lao, dung vo cay Hoa Ma che thanh, Tuong doi kien co. "

ItemData.Name: Thap phuong Cai y
ItemData.Descript: "Thuong phuc cua Cai Bang truong lao, rong ma khong du, thich hop chien dau"

ItemData.Name: Bach ket Cai y
ItemData.Descript: "Thuong phuc cua cac truong lao 9 tui, chi co bang chu va truong lao 9 tui moi duoc dung"

ItemData.Name: Trien To Thien Ket phuc
ItemData.Descript: "Do vo van soi to ket thanh, nguoi mac vao se co thien tinh"

ItemData.Name: Van Luu Quy Tong Y
ItemData.Descript: "Y phuc danh cho bang chu Cai Bang va cac vi truong lao 10 tui, tuong trung cho vo cong va dia vi. "

ItemData.Name: ao vai tho
ItemData.Descript: "ao vai tho so, khong co ten goi"

ItemData.Name: ao vai tho
ItemData.Descript: "ao vai tho so, khong co ten goi"

ItemData.Name: ao vai tho
ItemData.Descript: "ao vai tho so, khong co ten goi"

ItemData.Name: ao vai tho
ItemData.Descript: "ao vai tho so, khong co ten goi"

ItemData.Name: Hoang Cam doan y
ItemData.Descript: "Cam y tinh che, gon nhe linh hoat. "

ItemData.Name: Chuc giap doan sam
ItemData.Descript: "Ben trong co kham giap, co kha nang phong ngu. "

ItemData.Name: Huyen Hoang doan giap
ItemData.Descript: "Ben ngoai la ao, ben trong thuc chat la mot ao giap, suc phong ngu cu han. "

ItemData.Name: Bich Hoa Bao
ItemData.Descript: "Det tu to Bich Tam, mem mai "

ItemData.Name: Tuong Nhu bao
ItemData.Descript: ao nay se lam cho nguoi mac no co mot khi phach bat pham

ItemData.Name: Tuyen Long bao
ItemData.Descript: Phai hao suc cua 100 nguoi tho ren lam trong muoi nam

ItemData.Name: Sa Ni phuc
ItemData.Descript: Tang y danh cho cac tieu Sa Di vua nhap mon

ItemData.Name: Tang bao
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc tang nhan thuong mac

ItemData.Name: Bach Nap y
ItemData.Descript: Thuong phuc chu yeu cua cac Tang nhan Han trieu

ItemData.Name: An da hoi
ItemData.Descript: "Con goi la Ngu Dieu y, ao cua cac tang nhan mac trong nhung luc thong thuong"

ItemData.Name: Uat Da La Tang
ItemData.Descript: "Con goi la That Dieu y, ao cua cac tang nhan mac trong nhung luc trang nghiem"

ItemData.Name: Tang Hai
ItemData.Descript: "Le phuc cua Tang nhan, mac trong nhung luc trang nghiem"

ItemData.Name: Nguyen Bach ca sa
ItemData.Descript: "Con goi la That Dieu y, y phuc cua cac tang nhan chuc vi cao"

ItemData.Name: Minh tinh ca sa
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc thuong ngay cua cac vi cao tang

ItemData.Name: Kim Lo ca sa
ItemData.Descript: bao vat cua Phat mon

ItemData.Name: That Bao ca sa
ItemData.Descript: "La ""Phat mon chi bao"", do Phat To tang cho Duong Tam Tang khi di thinh kinh"

ItemData.Name: Nu thuc dao y
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc thuong nhat cua cac nu dao si.

ItemData.Name: Tu Chan dao y
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc lam viec cua cac nu dao si ngheo

ItemData.Name: Hoa Hoan dao y
ItemData.Descript: Dao y cao cap duoc lam tu vai Hoa Hoan

ItemData.Name: Bich Ha dao y
ItemData.Descript: "Mau sac thanh thoat, tuy la dao y nhung cung khong kem phan linh dong"

ItemData.Name: Bat quai dao y
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc cua nhung dao si moi nhap mon

ItemData.Name: Han Mai dao y
ItemData.Descript: "Tuyet pham dao y cua cac nu dao si, tuy nghiem trang ma thanh thoat"

ItemData.Name: Vo Cuc Dao y
ItemData.Descript: "Dai thanh vo dung, dai dao vo cuc. "

ItemData.Name: Dia Duyen dao y
ItemData.Descript: La mot bao y co chua Am Linh khi.

ItemData.Name: Bang Tam dao y
ItemData.Descript: "To cua Bang Tam ket thanh, nguoi mac vao cot cach nhu than tien"

ItemData.Name: Long Tieu dao y
ItemData.Descript: "Dao y duoc ket bang nhieu thu lua quy, cot cach phi thuong, co the xem la bao boi. "

ItemData.Name: Thuc Cam y
ItemData.Descript: "Ket bang thu to dieu cua vung ty Xuyen, chac chan kho xuyen"

ItemData.Name: Lang To y
ItemData.Descript: La nu y cao cap det bang to thuong hang.

ItemData.Name: Cam Trong y
ItemData.Descript: La nu y cao cap det bang to thuong hang.

ItemData.Name: Linh Xa y
ItemData.Descript: "Giong nhu khoat tren nguoi mot tam da ran, cu dong cuc ky linh hoat"

ItemData.Name: Huyen Ly y
ItemData.Descript: "Nu phuc, duoc may bang da rai ca. "

ItemData.Name: Hac Bao y
ItemData.Descript: "ao duoc may tu da Hac Bao, mem mai ma phu quy cac danh gia vong toc. "

ItemData.Name: Ho Bi y
ItemData.Descript: "May bang da ho, mac vao khi luc tang len, cuc ky hiem thay. "

ItemData.Name: Van Nghe thuong
ItemData.Descript: "Mem deo la luot, de dong long nguoi"

ItemData.Name: Me Hon Thuong
ItemData.Descript: "Khien cho nguoi khac phai hon phi phach lac khi nhin thay, tiem an ma luc"

ItemData.Name: Cuu Vi Bach Ho trang
ItemData.Descript: "Duoc may tu duoi cua 9 con Ho Ly tinh, mac vao nang luc vo song"

ItemData.Name: Cam Sam
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc duoc che tu nhung loai vai thong thuong.

ItemData.Name: Khoi Ly sam
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc dep nhu hoa tuoi cua nu dao si.

ItemData.Name: Hoa Sa sam
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc duoc ket tu nhieu soi to cua hoa.

ItemData.Name: Thuc Cam Sam
ItemData.Descript: La loai y phuc duoc che thanh tu nhieu loai thao dia.

ItemData.Name: Tong Cam Sam
ItemData.Descript: La loai y phuc duoc che thanh tu nhieu loai thao dia noi tieng o To Chau.

ItemData.Name: Van Cam Sam
ItemData.Descript: La loai y phuc duoc che thanh tu nhieu loai thao dia noi tieng o Kim Lang

ItemData.Name: Thanh La sam
ItemData.Descript: "Ben ngoai la ao nhung ben trong la giap, kha nang phong ngu rat tot"

ItemData.Name: Tat Sa sam
ItemData.Descript: "Dung toan la nhung thao duoc quy che thanh, Co kha nang phong ngu rat tot. "

ItemData.Name: Lang La sam
ItemData.Descript: "Dung toan la nhung thao duoc quy che thanh, dep de la ky. "

ItemData.Name: Tram Huong sam
ItemData.Descript: "Trong ao luon phang phat mui tram huong, nhu tien nu giang tran. "

ItemData.Name: Kham Thiet nu giap
ItemData.Descript: ao giap thong thuong cua nu gioi.

ItemData.Name: Thanh Dong nu giap
ItemData.Descript: "La ao giap cua nu, duoc ket bang nghung mieng dong xanh, co kha nang phong ngu cuc tot. "

ItemData.Name: Bach Nhi giap
ItemData.Descript: La loai ao giap thuong thay cua cac nu tuong.

ItemData.Name: Lam Yen Cang giap
ItemData.Descript: "La ao giap duoc ket bang nhung mieng thep cu mong, kho ma tim thay"

ItemData.Name: Hong Nhi giap
ItemData.Descript: La loai ao giap cao cap cua cac nu tuong.

ItemData.Name: Xich Nhan giap
ItemData.Descript: "ao giap duoc ket bang long Nhan do, nu tinh thuong hay dung. "

ItemData.Name: Huyet Dong giap
ItemData.Descript: "Che tao bi truyen, mau do huyen bi. "

ItemData.Name: Lan Ngan giap
ItemData.Descript: "Lan Ngan tao thanh, nhe ma chac chan. "

ItemData.Name: Huyen Thiet Tuyet Ngan giap
ItemData.Descript: "La loai giap ket hop Thiet va Bac, cac nu tuong thuong rat thich dung. "

ItemData.Name: Tich Lich Kim Phung giap
ItemData.Descript: "Ho giap cua Muc Que Anh, theo truyen thuyet la do Thanh Mau ban tang. "

ItemData.Name: Pha Ma y
ItemData.Descript: La loai ao duoc lam tu vo cay Ma thu.

ItemData.Name: Pha Mien y
ItemData.Descript: La loai ao duoc ket bang bong.

ItemData.Name: Pha Con y
ItemData.Descript: La loai Con y nhung ben ngoai hoi giong Pha Mien y.

ItemData.Name: Bach Bo y
ItemData.Descript: Loai ao duoc ket lai tu nhung ao cu rach khac.

ItemData.Name: Thien bo y
ItemData.Descript: "Loai ao duoc may tu vo so ao cu rach khac, day va am. "

ItemData.Name: Duong Bi giap
ItemData.Descript: "Dung da de va Ma Bo hop thanh, tinh phong ngu rat cao. "

ItemData.Name: Nguu Bi giap
ItemData.Descript: "Dung da trau va Ma Bo hop thanh, tinh phong ngu rat cao. "

ItemData.Name: Tu Thu y
ItemData.Descript: "Dung da mau tim cua loai chuot ky di, tinh phong ngu rat cao. "

ItemData.Name: Khoi Dieu y
ItemData.Descript: "Ket tu duoi cua da Dieu, trong co ve cu ky nhung suc phong ngu phi thuong. "

ItemData.Name: Van Chung Te Tam Y
ItemData.Descript: "The hien tinh than doan ket cua Cai bang, tren duoi dong long, viec gi cung xong. "

ItemData.Name: Bach Diep quan
ItemData.Descript: La loai thuong phuc cua nu gioi.

ItemData.Name: Thanh La quan
ItemData.Descript: Loai quan ao duoc det bang nhung loai to thuong.

ItemData.Name: Chuc Cam Thach Luu quan
ItemData.Descript: "Det bang cam Tu Hoa, gia tri phi pham. "

ItemData.Name: Song Diep Tu La quan
ItemData.Descript: "Det bang cam Tu Hoa, cot cach quy phai. "

ItemData.Name: Bach O quan
ItemData.Descript: "Det bang long cua 100 con qua, cuc ky hiem thay. "

ItemData.Name: Nguyet Hoa quan
ItemData.Descript: Loai quan phat ra anh sang ky ao nhu anh sang trang.

ItemData.Name: Phong Vi quan
ItemData.Descript: "Det bang long Dong Tuoc, vua cao quy vua co tinh nang bao ve. "

ItemData.Name: Kinh Bao quan
ItemData.Descript: Loai y phuc duoc kham bang nhieu loai nu trang quy.

ItemData.Name: Bach Phong Trieu Duong quan
ItemData.Descript: anh sang huyen dieu nhu buoi chieu ta.

ItemData.Name: Luu Tien Quan
ItemData.Descript: "Truyen thuyet noi rang day la do Trieu Phi Yen thoi Han tu tay lam ra, mac vao nhu dang du tien. "

ItemData.Name: Sa Di phuc
ItemData.Descript: Tang y danh cho cac tieu Sa Di vua nhap mon

ItemData.Name: Tang y
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc tang nhan thuong mac

ItemData.Name: Bach Nap y
ItemData.Descript: Thuong phuc chu yeu cua cac Tang nhan Han trieu

ItemData.Name: An da hoi
ItemData.Descript: "Con goi la Ngu Dieu y, ao cua cac tang nhan mac trong nhung luc thong thuong"

ItemData.Name: Uat Da La Tang
ItemData.Descript: "Con goi la That Dieu y, ao cua cac tang nhan mac trong nhung luc trang nghiem"

ItemData.Name: Tang Hai
ItemData.Descript: "Le phuc cua Tang nhan, mac trong nhung luc trang nghiem"

ItemData.Name: Nguyen Bach Ca Sa
ItemData.Descript: "Con goi la That Dieu y, y phuc cua cac tang nhan chuc vi cao"

ItemData.Name: Minh Tinh Ca Sa
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc thuong ngay cua cac vi cao tang

ItemData.Name: Kim Lo Ca Sa
ItemData.Descript: bao vat cua Phat mon

ItemData.Name: That Bao Ca Sa
ItemData.Descript: "La ""Phat mon chi bao"", do Phat To tang cho Duong Tam Tang khi di thinh kinh"

ItemData.Name: Dao si vo bao
ItemData.Descript: La y phuc cua cac dao si thuong mac khi luyen vo

ItemData.Name: Dao si truong bao
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc thuong ngay cua Dao si

ItemData.Name: Tinh y
ItemData.Descript: Le phuc cua cac Dao si thuong mac khi lam phep

ItemData.Name: Thanh Tung Phap bao
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc cua nhung dao si moi nhap mon

ItemData.Name: Thien su dao bao
ItemData.Descript: "Y phuc chi danh cho nhung nguoi dao hanh tham sau, duoc ton danh Thien Su "

ItemData.Name: Huyen Vo phap y
ItemData.Descript: "Tap hop linh khi Huyen Vo, ""Huyen mon chi bao"""

ItemData.Name: That Bao Ha y
ItemData.Descript: "Trong ben ngoai co ve tam thuong, nhung thuc chat la mot ""bao y"""

ItemData.Name: Tam Thanh Bao
ItemData.Descript: "Phan ta quy chanh, nguoi mac no luon co long thien tam. "

ItemData.Name: Thien Nien Hac Suong
ItemData.Descript: "Dung long Hac de diem xuyen xung quanh, day chinh la su tuong trung cho tri hue. "

ItemData.Name: Chan Vu Thanh Y
ItemData.Descript: Mac vao se giup ta tang nhanh than luc

ItemData.Name: Con y
ItemData.Descript: ao danh cho cac sat thu cap thap nhat an giau than phan

ItemData.Name: Te Truc Con y
ItemData.Descript: Con y duoc dac che

ItemData.Name: Thich Khach y
ItemData.Descript: Cung giong nhu Con y nhung co nhieu tui de chua am khi.

ItemData.Name: Mong mi y
ItemData.Descript: "Dung cac vat lieu dac biet ma che thanh, su dung linh hoat. "

ItemData.Name: Vo Sac y
ItemData.Descript: "Co the tang hinh di vao nhieu noi, thich hop cho sat thu "

ItemData.Name: Ngu Nhan y
ItemData.Descript: Trang bi cho cac sat thu cap cao.

ItemData.Name: Lien Van y
ItemData.Descript: "Y phuc hiem co, tinh linh hoat va tinh phong ngu cuc cao"

ItemData.Name: Thien Mong y
ItemData.Descript: "Nguoi mac vao hinh bong giong nhu trong mo, khong the bat duoc"

ItemData.Name: Vo Dung Kinh y
ItemData.Descript: "La thu ao ma cac thich khach deu thich trang bi, co the giau duoc nhieu am khi. "

ItemData.Name: Thien Nhan Mat Trang
ItemData.Descript: "Tap trung sat khi vo bien, gap than giet than, gap Phat giet Phat. "

ItemData.Name: Tho Bo truong bao
ItemData.Descript: Do cac loai vai tho det thanh

ItemData.Name: Khinh Cat sam
ItemData.Descript: "To Cat det thanh, chac chan kho xuyen. "

ItemData.Name: Doan bao
ItemData.Descript: "Cam doan det thanh, mem mai thoai mai. "

ItemData.Name: Dat Hiep y
ItemData.Descript: "Thich hop voi cac hiep khach, nhe nhang linh hoat. "

ItemData.Name: Nhiem Hiep phuc
ItemData.Descript: La loai y phuc ma cac hiep khach o Ngu Lang thuong mac.

ItemData.Name: Luu Thai Phuc
ItemData.Descript: "Dang ve nho nha, mem mai ma nghiem trang. "

ItemData.Name: Ngan To Bao
ItemData.Descript: "Dung Tam to phoi hop voi Ngan to che thanh, co kha nang phong ngu cuc tot. "

ItemData.Name: Tu Kim bao
ItemData.Descript: "Dung Tam to phoi hop voi Kim to che thanh, vua danh quy vua co the ho than. "

ItemData.Name: Han Suong bao
ItemData.Descript: "Dung Tam to phoi hop voi Bach Kim to che thanh, danh quy vo cung. "

ItemData.Name: Giang Sa Bao
ItemData.Descript: "Dung Giang Sa che thanh, dung cho cac bac de vuong, cao quy kho ta. "

ItemData.Name: Toa Tu giap
ItemData.Descript: "Trang bi cho nhung si tot trong quan doi, suc phong ngu kem. "

ItemData.Name: Luong Dang Khai
ItemData.Descript: "Do hai manh truoc sau hop thanh, thoi Pho Duong thuong thay. "

ItemData.Name: Minh Quang Khai
ItemData.Descript: Loai ao giap thuong trang bi cho binh si thoi Duong.

ItemData.Name: Te Lan giap
ItemData.Descript: "Do nhieu mieng thep mong ghep thanh, gon nhe linh hoat. "

ItemData.Name: O Chuy giap
ItemData.Descript: "ao giap nhu hinh dang qua, gon nhe linh hoat. "

ItemData.Name: Son Van Tu giap
ItemData.Descript: "La mot manh ao giap. giua loi, hai ben lom, cong dung chong ten. "

ItemData.Name: Giai Trai giap
ItemData.Descript: "Dung toan da cua quai thu va da Giai Trai ket thanh, kien co vo cung. "

ItemData.Name: Toan Nghe giap
ItemData.Descript: "La loai ao giap cua cac danh tuong, dao ten khong the xuyen thung. "

ItemData.Name: Toa Tu Hoang Kim giap
ItemData.Descript: "Thien ha vang danh, dao ten khong the pham vao da"

ItemData.Name: Duong Nghe giap
ItemData.Descript: "truyen thiet day la ho than bao giap cua La On Hau, la ho phap cuc pham"

ItemData.Name: Lan Bo y
ItemData.Descript: "la thu vai bang vo cay, chi mac nhung luc binh thuong"

ItemData.Name: Pho thong Cai y
ItemData.Descript: "La y phuc cua nhung nguoi an may binh thuong, giong nhu Bo y, co rat nhieu tui"

ItemData.Name: ao an may
ItemData.Descript: "La y phuc cua nhung nguoi an may binh thuong, danh cho nguoi cap thap nhat"

ItemData.Name: Tho Ma Cai y
ItemData.Descript: La y phuc cua nhung nguoi an may binh thuonglam bang vo cay

ItemData.Name: Tam Ma Cai y
ItemData.Descript: "Thuong phuc cua Cai Bang truong lao, tinh che tu nhung cay Tam Ma. "

ItemData.Name: Hoa Ma Cai y
ItemData.Descript: "Thuong phuc cua Cai Bang truong lao, dung vo cay Hoa Ma che thanh, Tuong doi kien co. "

ItemData.Name: Thap phuong Cai y
ItemData.Descript: "Thuong phuc cua Cai Bang truong lao, rong ma khong du, thich hop chien dau"

ItemData.Name: Bach ket Cai y
ItemData.Descript: "Thuong phuc cua cac truong lao 9 tui, chi co bang chu va truong lao 9 tui moi duoc dung"

ItemData.Name: Trien To Thien Ket phuc
ItemData.Descript: "Do vo van soi to ket thanh, nguoi mac vao se co thien tinh"

ItemData.Name: Van Luu Quy Tong Y
ItemData.Descript: "Y phuc danh cho bang chu Cai Bang va cac vi truong lao 10 tui, tuong trung cho vo cong va dia vi. "

ItemData.Name: ao vai tho
ItemData.Descript: "ao vai tho so, khong co ten goi"

ItemData.Name: ao vai tho
ItemData.Descript: "ao vai tho so, khong co ten goi"

ItemData.Name: ao vai tho
ItemData.Descript: "ao vai tho so, khong co ten goi"

ItemData.Name: ao vai tho
ItemData.Descript: "ao vai tho so, khong co ten goi"

ItemData.Name: Hoang Cam doan y
ItemData.Descript: "Cam y tinh che, gon nhe linh hoat. "

ItemData.Name: Chuc giap doan sam
ItemData.Descript: "Ben trong co kham giap, co kha nang phong ngu. "

ItemData.Name: Huyen Hoang doan giap
ItemData.Descript: "Ben ngoai la ao, ben trong thuc chat la mot ao giap, suc phong ngu cu han. "

ItemData.Name: Bich Hoa Bao
ItemData.Descript: "Det tu to Bich Tam, mem mai "

ItemData.Name: Tuong Nhu bao
ItemData.Descript: ao nay se lam cho nguoi mac no co mot khi phach bat pham

ItemData.Name: Tuyen Long bao
ItemData.Descript: Phai hao suc cua 100 nguoi tho ren lam trong muoi nam

ItemData.Name: Sa Ni phuc
ItemData.Descript: Tang y danh cho cac tieu Sa Di vua nhap mon

ItemData.Name: Tang bao
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc tang nhan thuong mac

ItemData.Name: Bach Nap y
ItemData.Descript: Thuong phuc chu yeu cua cac Tang nhan Han trieu

ItemData.Name: An da hoi
ItemData.Descript: "Con goi la Ngu Dieu y, ao cua cac tang nhan mac trong nhung luc thong thuong"

ItemData.Name: Uat Da La Tang
ItemData.Descript: "Con goi la That Dieu y, ao cua cac tang nhan mac trong nhung luc trang nghiem"

ItemData.Name: Tang Hai
ItemData.Descript: "Le phuc cua Tang nhan, mac trong nhung luc trang nghiem"

ItemData.Name: Nguyen Bach ca sa
ItemData.Descript: "Con goi la That Dieu y, y phuc cua cac tang nhan chuc vi cao"

ItemData.Name: Minh tinh ca sa
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc thuong ngay cua cac vi cao tang

ItemData.Name: Kim Lo ca sa
ItemData.Descript: bao vat cua Phat mon

ItemData.Name: That Bao ca sa
ItemData.Descript: "La ""Phat mon chi bao"", do Phat To tang cho Duong Tam Tang khi di thinh kinh"

ItemData.Name: Nu thuc dao y
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc thuong nhat cua cac nu dao si.

ItemData.Name: Tu Chan dao y
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc lam viec cua cac nu dao si ngheo

ItemData.Name: Hoa Hoan dao y
ItemData.Descript: Dao y cao cap duoc lam tu vai Hoa Hoan

ItemData.Name: Bich Ha dao y
ItemData.Descript: "Mau sac thanh thoat, tuy la dao y nhung cung khong kem phan linh dong"

ItemData.Name: Bat quai dao y
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc cua nhung dao si moi nhap mon

ItemData.Name: Han Mai dao y
ItemData.Descript: "Tuyet pham dao y cua cac nu dao si, tuy nghiem trang ma thanh thoat"

ItemData.Name: Vo Cuc Dao y
ItemData.Descript: "Dai thanh vo dung, dai dao vo cuc. "

ItemData.Name: Dia Duyen dao y
ItemData.Descript: La mot bao y co chua Am Linh khi.

ItemData.Name: Bang Tam dao y
ItemData.Descript: "To cua Bang Tam ket thanh, nguoi mac vao cot cach nhu than tien"

ItemData.Name: Long Tieu dao y
ItemData.Descript: "Dao y duoc ket bang nhieu thu lua quy, cot cach phi thuong, co the xem la bao boi. "

ItemData.Name: Thuc Cam y
ItemData.Descript: "Ket bang thu to dieu cua vung ty Xuyen, chac chan kho xuyen"

ItemData.Name: Lang To y
ItemData.Descript: La nu y cao cap det bang to thuong hang.

ItemData.Name: Cam Trong y
ItemData.Descript: La nu y cao cap det bang to thuong hang.

ItemData.Name: Linh Xa y
ItemData.Descript: "Giong nhu khoat tren nguoi mot tam da ran, cu dong cuc ky linh hoat"

ItemData.Name: Huyen Ly y
ItemData.Descript: "Nu phuc, duoc may bang da rai ca. "

ItemData.Name: Hac Bao y
ItemData.Descript: "ao duoc may tu da Hac Bao, mem mai ma phu quy cac danh gia vong toc. "

ItemData.Name: Ho Bi y
ItemData.Descript: "May bang da ho, mac vao khi luc tang len, cuc ky hiem thay. "

ItemData.Name: Van Nghe thuong
ItemData.Descript: "Mem deo la luot, de dong long nguoi"

ItemData.Name: Me Hon Thuong
ItemData.Descript: "Khien cho nguoi khac phai hon phi phach lac khi nhin thay, tiem an ma luc"

ItemData.Name: Cuu Vi Bach Ho trang
ItemData.Descript: "Duoc may tu duoi cua 9 con Ho Ly tinh, mac vao nang luc vo song"

ItemData.Name: Cam Sam
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc duoc che tu nhung loai vai thong thuong.

ItemData.Name: Khoi Ly sam
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc dep nhu hoa tuoi cua nu dao si.

ItemData.Name: Hoa Sa sam
ItemData.Descript: Y phuc duoc ket tu nhieu soi to cua hoa.

ItemData.Name: Thuc Cam Sam
ItemData.Descript: La loai y phuc duoc che thanh tu nhieu loai thao dia.

ItemData.Name: Tong Cam Sam
ItemData.Descript: La loai y phuc duoc che thanh tu nhieu loai thao dia noi tieng o To Chau.

ItemData.Name: Van Cam Sam
ItemData.Descript: La loai y phuc duoc che thanh tu nhieu loai thao dia noi tieng o Kim Lang

ItemData.Name: Thanh La sam
ItemData.Descript: "Ben ngoai la ao nhung ben trong la giap, kha nang phong ngu rat tot"

ItemData.Name: Tat Sa sam
ItemData.Descript: "Dung toan la nhung thao duoc quy che thanh, Co kha nang phong ngu rat tot. "

ItemData.Name: Lang La sam
ItemData.Descript: "Dung toan la nhung thao duoc quy che thanh, dep de la ky. "

ItemData.Name: Tram Huong sam
ItemData.Descript: "Trong ao luon phang phat mui tram huong, nhu tien nu giang tran. "

ItemData.Name: Kham Thiet nu giap
ItemData.Descript: ao giap thong thuong cua nu gioi.

ItemData.Name: Thanh Dong nu giap
ItemData.Descript: "La ao giap cua nu, duoc ket bang nghung mieng dong xanh, co kha nang phong ngu cuc tot. "

ItemData.Name: Bach Nhi giap
ItemData.Descript: La loai ao giap thuong thay cua cac nu tuong.

ItemData.Name: Lam Yen Cang giap
ItemData.Descript: "La ao giap duoc ket bang nhung mieng thep cu mong, kho ma tim thay"

ItemData.Name: Hong Nhi giap
ItemData.Descript: La loai ao giap cao cap cua cac nu tuong.

ItemData.Name: Xich Nhan giap
ItemData.Descript: "ao giap duoc ket bang long Nhan do, nu tinh thuong hay dung. "

ItemData.Name: Huyet Dong giap
ItemData.Descript: "Che tao bi truyen, mau do huyen bi. "

ItemData.Name: Lan Ngan giap
ItemData.Descript: "Lan Ngan tao thanh, nhe ma chac chan. "

ItemData.Name: Huyen Thiet Tuyet Ngan giap
ItemData.Descript: "La loai giap ket hop Thiet va Bac, cac nu tuong thuong rat thich dung. "

ItemData.Name: Tich Lich Kim Phung giap
ItemData.Descript: "Ho giap cua Muc Que Anh, theo truyen thuyet la do Thanh Mau ban tang. "

ItemData.Name: Pha Ma y
ItemData.Descript: La loai ao duoc lam tu vo cay Ma thu.

ItemData.Name: Pha Mien y
ItemData.Descript: La loai ao duoc ket bang bong.

ItemData.Name: Pha Con y
ItemData.Descript: La loai Con y nhung ben ngoai hoi giong Pha Mien y.

ItemData.Name: Bach Bo y
ItemData.Descript: Loai ao duoc ket lai tu nhung ao cu rach khac.

ItemData.Name: Thien bo y
ItemData.Descript: "Loai ao duoc may tu vo so ao cu rach khac, day va am. "

ItemData.Name: Duong Bi giap
ItemData.Descript: "Dung da de va Ma Bo hop thanh, tinh phong ngu rat cao. "

ItemData.Name: Nguu Bi giap
ItemData.Descript: "Dung da trau va Ma Bo hop thanh, tinh phong ngu rat cao. "

ItemData.Name: Tu Thu y
ItemData.Descript: "Dung da mau tim cua loai chuot ky di, tinh phong ngu rat cao. "

ItemData.Name: Khoi Dieu y
ItemData.Descript: "Ket tu duoi cua da Dieu, trong co ve cu ky nhung suc phong ngu phi thuong. "

ItemData.Name: Van Chung Te Tam Y
ItemData.Descript: "The hien tinh than doan ket cua Cai bang, tren duoi dong long, viec gi cung xong. "

ItemData.Name: Bach Diep quan
ItemData.Descript: La loai thuong phuc cua nu gioi.

ItemData.Name: Thanh La quan
ItemData.Descript: Loai quan ao duoc det bang nhung loai to thuong.

ItemData.Name: Chuc Cam Thach Luu quan
ItemData.Descript: "Det bang cam Tu Hoa, gia tri phi pham. "

ItemData.Name: Song Diep Tu La quan
ItemData.Descript: "Det bang cam Tu Hoa, cot cach quy phai. "

ItemData.Name: Bach O quan
ItemData.Descript: "Det bang long cua 100 con qua, cuc ky hiem thay. "

ItemData.Name: Nguyet Hoa quan
ItemData.Descript: Loai quan phat ra anh sang ky ao nhu anh sang trang.

ItemData.Name: Phong Vi quan
ItemData.Descript: "Det bang long Dong Tuoc, vua cao quy vua co tinh nang bao ve. "

ItemData.Name: Kinh Bao quan
ItemData.Descript: Loai y phuc duoc kham bang nhieu loai nu trang quy.

ItemData.Name: Bach Phong Trieu Duong quan
ItemData.Descript: anh sang huyen dieu nhu buoi chieu ta.

ItemData.Name: Luu Tien Quan
ItemData.Descript: "Truyen thuyet noi rang day la do Trieu Phi Yen thoi Han tu tay lam ra, mac vao nhu dang du tien. "

ItemData.Name: Phong Trang
ItemData.Descript: Le phuc cua tan nuong mac trong hon le

ItemData.Name: Kinh Thien giap
ItemData.Descript: "ao giap det bang vang, sac thai uy phong, bao vat hiem thay, Vua nhin da thay the hien duocSuc manh. "

ItemData.Name: Thanh Tuyet Y
ItemData.Descript: "La loai ao dai thuong thay, sac thai uy phong, tuong trung cho su cao quy "

ItemData.Name: Phung quan
ItemData.Descript: Le phuc cua tan nuong mac trong hon le

ItemData.Name: Khap Dia quan
ItemData.Descript: "La loai ao dai thuong thay, sac thai uy phong, tuong trung cho su cao quy. "

ItemData.Name: Bang Tinh Quan
ItemData.Descript: "Loai ao dai nu tuong thich mac, the hien ve dep nhu mi hoan my cua nu tinh. "

ItemData.Name: Nhan ao moi
ItemData.Descript: "Loai truong y may tu Kim to, mac vao nhung dip nam moi"

ItemData.Name: ao mung tuoi
ItemData.Descript: "Loai quan ao duoc may tu nhung loai lua quy, mac trong nhung dip le tiet. "

ItemData.Name: Bang Tinh Quan
ItemData.Descript: "Loai ao dai nu tuong thich mac, the hien ve dep nhu mi hoan my cua nu tinh. "

ItemData.Name: Bang Tinh Quan
ItemData.Descript: "Loai ao dai nu tuong thich mac, the hien ve dep nhu mi hoan my cua nu tinh. "
